languages.text: Все попытки открыть врата провалились. Когда служители Бога-Машины перегрузили батарею плазменного резака, надеясь прожечь проход, расчеты оказались фатально неточны. После того, как ослепительная вспышка угасла, выжившие увидели обугленные тела тех, кто не успел укрыться. Путь был свободен, но плата оказалась высокой.

traits.locale_text: Никакие литании не смогли сдвинуть плиту, пропитанную колдовством ксеносов. Тогда, в великой спешке, служители Бога-Машины перегрузили часть запаса плазменных капсул, надеясь прожечь проход. Расчеты оказались фатально неточны: высвобожденная энергия многократно превысила ожидания. Ве вокруг озарилось ослепительным светом миниатюрного солнца. Когда сияние угасло, вокруг остались обугленные тела тех, кто не успел укрыться, а многие из уцелевших навсегда погрузились во тьму, ослепленные безудержной мощью плазмы.

languages.text: All attempts to open the gate came to naught. When the servants of the Omnissiah overloaded the battery of the plasma cutter, hoping to burn their way through, their calculations proved fatally inaccurate. When the blinding flash faded, the survivors saw the charred bodies of those who had failed to take cover in time. The way was clear, but at high cost.
languages.original_text: Все попытки открыть врата провалились. Когда служители Бога-Машины перегрузили батарею плазменного резака, надеясь прожечь проход, расчеты оказались фатально неточны. После того, как ослепительная вспышка угасла, выжившие увидели обугленные тела тех, кто не успел укрыться. Путь был свободен, но плата оказалась высокой.

traits.locale_text: All attempts to open the gate came to naught. When the servants of the Omnissiah overloaded the battery of the plasma cutter, hoping to burn their way through, their calculations proved fatally inaccurate. When the blinding flash had faded, the survivors saw the charred bodies of those who had failed to take cover in time. The path was cleared, but at a high cost.

All attempts to open the gate came to naught. When the servants of the Omnissiah overloaded the battery of the plasma cutter, hoping to burn their way through, their calculations proved fatally inaccurate. When the blinding flash faded, the survivors saw the charred bodies of those who had failed to take cover in time. The way was clear, but at high cost.

All attempts to move the shaft lid came to naught. When the servants of the Machine God overloaded part of their stock of plasma capsules, hoping to burn their way through, their calculations proved fatally inaccurate. When the blinding flash had faded, the survivors saw the charred bodies of those who had failed to take cover in time.

All attempts to open the gate came to naught. When the servants of the Omnissiah overloaded the battery of the plasma cutter, hoping to burn their way through, their calculations proved fatally inaccurate. When the blinding flash had faded, the survivors saw the charred bodies of those who had failed to take cover in time. The path was cleared, but at a high cost.

All attempts to open the gate came to naught. When the servants of the Omnissiah overloaded the battery of the plasma cutter, hoping to burn their way through, their calculations proved fatally inaccurate. When the blinding flash faded, the survivors saw the charred bodies of those who had failed to take cover in time. The way was clear, but at high cost.

languages.text: 所有打开大门的尝试均以失败告终。欧姆尼赛亚的仆从试图过载等离子切割器电池，指望以此熔穿通道，可他们的计算却出现了致命偏差。灼眼的强光消退后，幸存者们眼前只剩下那些未能及时躲避之人焦黑的遗骸。道路打通了，可是代价极其惨重。
languages.original_text: All attempts to open the gate came to naught. When the servants of the Omnissiah overloaded the battery of the plasma cutter, hoping to burn their way through, their calculations proved fatally inaccurate. When the blinding flash faded, the survivors saw the charred bodies of those who had failed to take cover in time. The way was clear, but at high cost.

traits.locale_text: 所有打开大门的尝试均以失败告终。欧姆尼赛亚的仆从试图过载等离子切割器电池，指望以此熔穿通道，可他们的计算却出现了致命偏差。灼眼的强光消退后，幸存者们眼前只剩下那些未能及时躲避之人焦黑的遗骸。道路打通了，可是代价极其惨重。

languages.text: Nuestros intentos de mover la tapa del conducto fueron en vano. Los sirvientes del Omnissiah sobrecargaron la batería del soplete de plasma, intentando abrirse paso con el fuego, pero sus cálculos contenían un error fatal. Tras recuperar la visión, los supervivientes fueron testigos de los cuerpos calcinados de aquellos que tardaron demasiado en ocultarse. El camino había sido abierto, pero el coste fue elevado.
languages.original_text: All attempts to open the gate came to naught. When the servants of the Omnissiah overloaded the battery of the plasma cutter, hoping to burn their way through, their calculations proved fatally inaccurate. When the blinding flash faded, the survivors saw the charred bodies of those who had failed to take cover in time. The way was clear, but at high cost.

traits.locale_text: Nuestros intentos de mover la tapa del conducto fueron en vano. Los sirvientes del Omnissiah sobrecargaron la batería del soplete de plasma, intentando abrirse paso con el fuego, pero sus cálculos contenían un error fatal. Tras recuperar la visión, los supervivientes fueron testigos de los cuerpos calcinados de aquellos que tardaron demasiado en ocultarse. El camino había sido abierto, pero el coste fue elevado.

languages.text: Malgré tous ses efforts, l'escouade fut incapable d'ouvrir la porte. Les serviteurs de l'Omnimessie surchargèrent alors la batterie du découpeur à plasma dans l'espoir de faire fondre le métal, mais ce fut là une erreur de calcul fatale. Lorsque l'éclair aveuglant s'estompa, les survivants se retrouvèrent face aux cadavres calcinés de ceux qui n'avaient pas réussi à s'abriter à temps. La voie était dégagée, mais ils avaient payé le prix fort.
languages.original_text: All attempts to open the gate came to naught. When the servants of the Omnissiah overloaded the battery of the plasma cutter, hoping to burn their way through, their calculations proved fatally inaccurate. When the blinding flash faded, the survivors saw the charred bodies of those who had failed to take cover in time. The way was clear, but at high cost.

traits.locale_text: Malgré tous ses efforts, l'escouade fut incapable d'ouvrir la porte. Les serviteurs de l'Omnimessie surchargèrent alors la batterie du découpeur à plasma dans l'espoir de faire fondre le métal, mais ce fut là une erreur de calcul fatale. Lorsque l'éclair aveuglant s'estompa, les survivants se retrouvèrent face aux cadavres calcinés de ceux qui n'avaient pas réussi à s'abriter à temps. La voie était dégagée, mais ils avaient payé le prix fort.

languages.text: Kapıyı açmaya yönelik girişimlerin hepsi boşa çıktı. Hermesih'in hizmetkârları, yollarını yakarak açmak umuduyla plazma kesicisinin bataryasını aşırı yüklediklerinde hesaplamalarının ölümcül derecede yanlış olduğu ortaya çıktı. Kör edici parıltı söndüğünde hayatta kalanlar, zamanında siper alamayanların kömürleşmiş cesetlerini gördü. Yol açılsa da bedeli ağır olmuştu.
languages.original_text: All attempts to open the gate came to naught. When the servants of the Omnissiah overloaded the battery of the plasma cutter, hoping to burn their way through, their calculations proved fatally inaccurate. When the blinding flash faded, the survivors saw the charred bodies of those who had failed to take cover in time. The way was clear, but at high cost.

traits.locale_text: Kapıyı açmaya yönelik girişimlerin hepsi boşa çıktı. Hermesih'in hizmetkârları, yollarını yakarak açmak umuduyla plazma kesicisinin bataryasını aşırı yüklediklerinde hesaplamalarının ölümcül derecede yanlış olduğu ortaya çıktı. Kör edici parıltı söndüğünde hayatta kalanlar, zamanında siper alamayanların kömürleşmiş cesetlerini gördü. Yol açılsa da bedeli ağır olmuştu.

languages.text: Alle Versuche, das Tor zu öffnen, blieben erfolglos. Als die Diener des Omnissiah die Batterie des Plasmaschneiders überluden, um sich den Weg freizubrennen, erwiesen sich ihre Berechnungen als tödlich ungenau. Nach einem gleißenden Blitz sahen die Überlebenden die verkohlten Leichen ihrer Kameraden, die nicht rechtzeitig in Deckung gehen konnten. Der Weg war frei, aber zu einem hohen Preis.
languages.original_text: All attempts to open the gate came to naught. When the servants of the Omnissiah overloaded the battery of the plasma cutter, hoping to burn their way through, their calculations proved fatally inaccurate. When the blinding flash faded, the survivors saw the charred bodies of those who had failed to take cover in time. The way was clear, but at high cost.

traits.locale_text: Alle Versuche, das Tor zu öffnen, blieben erfolglos. Als die Diener des Omnissiah die Batterie des Plasmaschneiders überluden, um sich den Weg freizubrennen, erwiesen sich ihre Berechnungen als tödlich ungenau. Nach einem gleißenden Blitz sahen die Überlebenden die verkohlten Leichen ihrer Kameraden, die nicht rechtzeitig in Deckung gehen konnten. Der Weg war frei, aber zu einem hohen Preis.

languages.text: シャフトの蓋を動かすあらゆる試みは失敗に終わった。機械神を崇拝する者たちは、 プラスマカプセルを過剰に燃やしてシャフトの蓋を破壊しようと試みたが、その計算は致命的な誤りだった。眩しい閃光が消えると、生き残った者たちは、間に合わなかった者たちの焦げた遺体を見つけた。
languages.original_text: All attempts to move the shaft lid came to naught. When the servants of the Machine God overloaded part of their stock of plasma capsules, hoping to burn their way through, their calculations proved fatally inaccurate. When the blinding flash had faded, the survivors saw the charred bodies of those who had failed to take cover in time.

traits.locale_text: シャフトの蓋を動かすあらゆる試みは失敗に終わった。機械神を崇拝する者たちは、 plasmaカプセルを過剰に燃やしてシャフトの蓋を破壊しようと試みたが、その計算は致命的な誤りだった。眩しい閃光が消えると、生き残った者たちは、間に合わなかった者たちの焦げた遺体を見つけた。
